prompt: A cinematic futuristic short film about a lonely young man addicted to technology in a hyper-connected AI world where nobody talks face to face anymore. People communicate only through holograms, smart glasses, and social media. One day, the internet suddenly shuts down globally. Phones die, AI assistants stop, and the city becomes silent. Slowly, people reconnect in real life — families talk, children play outside, strangers smile naturally. The protagonist meets a girl reading a physical book under a streetlight and experiences genuine human connection for the first time. Emotional ending where he voluntarily switches off his phone as sunrise lights the city. Ultra realistic visuals, neon cyberpunk city, emotional atmosphere, cinematic camera movement, Hollywood movie quality, deep emotional storytelling, dramatic soundtrack, masterpiece short film aesthetic.

scenes.visualPrompt:
EXT. NEO-VERIDIA STREETS - NIGHT (CYBERPUNK)
[ACTION] RAIN-slicked streets of a futuristic megalopolis glow with holographic advertisements and neon signs. Crowds of people, faces illuminated by the soft glow of smart glasses, move in a silent, synchronized trance, eyes fixed on their augmented realities. LIAM (20s, gaunt, dressed in sleek tech-wear) walks amidst them, his own smart glasses projecting complex data streams directly onto his retina. He navigates a virtual conversation, occasionally gesturing subtly to an invisible interface. His expression is distant, detached.
[CAMERA] Low-angle tracking shot, following Liam through the bustling, digitally-absorbed crowd. Volumetric lighting from neon signs paints streaks across the frame. Shallow depth of field blurs the background into an abstract digital haze, emphasizing Liam's isolation. Aspect ratio 16:9, anamorphic lens flare.
scenes.dialogueOrNarration: NARRATOR: In the chrome canyons of Neo-Veridia, we built a world of endless connections, yet found ourselves utterly alone.
scenes.audioPrompt: VOCALS: Deep, melancholic narration. SFX: Subtle, constant hum of digital interfaces, distant drone of flying vehicles, soft, synthetic rain. AMBIENT: Evocative, melancholic synthwave with a subtle, underlying tension.

scenes.visualPrompt:
EXT. NEO-VERIDIA STREETS - NIGHT (BLACKOUT)
[ACTION] The neon cityscape flickers violently. Holograms distort, then vanish. Smart glasses go dark, plunging faces into sudden shadow. A collective, confused murmur rises from the crowd. Liam stops, his own glasses now a blank pane of glass. He looks around, disoriented, as the grand digital symphony of the city dies into an eerie silence. Emergency backup lights hum to life, casting long, stark shadows.
[CAMERA] A series of quick, jarring cuts: extreme close-up on Liam's eyes as the light leaves his glasses, wide shot of the city's digital arteries going dark, then a slow, unsettling dolly out from Liam's face to reveal the now-silent, dimly lit street filled with lost, unmoving figures. Handheld for the initial shock, then stable.
scenes.dialogueOrNarration: NARRATOR: Then, the hum died. The world went silent, forcing us to look up, to finally see each other.
scenes.audioPrompt: VOCALS: Narration with a sudden, sharp clarity. SFX: High-pitched digital whine that abruptly cuts off, followed by a digital flatline sound. Distant confused murmurs growing into a faint, uneasy silence. AMBIENT: Abrupt cessation of synthwave, replaced by a deep, unsettling silence, punctuated by a low, almost mournful hum of emergency power.

scenes.visualPrompt:
EXT. CITY SQUARE - DAWN (QUIET)
[ACTION] The first rays of dawn pierce through the lingering darkness, painting the sky in soft purples and oranges. The city is quiet, illuminated only by a few streetlights and the nascent sun. Liam walks through an empty square, his shoulders less hunched. He sees ELARA (20s), sitting on a bench under an old-fashioned streetlight, engrossed in a physical, paper book. He approaches cautiously. Their eyes meet. A soft, genuine smile spreads across Elara's face, mirrored hesitantly by Liam. He reaches into his pocket, pulls out his smart glasses (now just dark frames), and switches them off with a definitive click. He looks up at the rising sun.
[CAMERA] Steadicam tracking Liam's tentative steps towards Elara. A slow push-in as their eyes connect, holding on their shared, dawning smiles. Close-up on Liam's hand as he purposefully switches off his device. Crane shot slowly rising, revealing the vast, quiet city square bathed in the soft light of sunrise, with Liam and Elara as small, hopeful figures.
scenes.dialogueOrNarration:
LIAM: I… I haven’t felt anything real like this in years.
ELARA: (Smiling gently) The quiet has a way of showing us what truly matters.
scenes.audioPrompt: VOCALS: Soft, sincere dialogue. SFX: Gentle morning birdsong, distant, real-world sounds of an awakening city (a dog barking, a distant car horn), the quiet click of a power button. AMBIENT: A gentle, hopeful orchestral swell with a prominent, warm piano melody, building to a quietly majestic finish.

prompt: A cinematic futuristic short film about a lonely young man addicted to technology in a hyper-connected AI world where nobody talks face to face anymore. People communicate only through holograms, smart glasses, and social media. One day, the internet suddenly shuts down globally. Phones die, AI assistants stop, and the city becomes silent. Slowly, people reconnect in real life — families talk, children play outside, strangers smile naturally. The protagonist meets a girl reading a physical book under a streetlight and experiences genuine human connection for the first time. Emotional ending where he voluntarily switches off his phone as sunrise lights the city. Ultra realistic visuals, neon cyberpunk city, emotional atmosphere, cinematic camera movement, Hollywood movie quality, deep emotional storytelling, dramatic soundtrack, masterpiece short film aesthetic.

prompt: A cinematic futuristic short film about a lonely young man addicted to technology in a hyper-connected AI world where nobody talks face to face anymore. People communicate only through holograms, smart glasses, and social media. One day, the internet suddenly shuts down globally. Phones die, AI assistants stop, and the city becomes silent. Slowly, people reconnect in real life — families talk, children play outside, strangers smile naturally. The protagonist meets a girl reading a physical book under a streetlight and experiences genuine human connection for the first time. Emotional ending where he voluntarily switches off his phone as sunrise lights the city. Ultra realistic visuals, neon cyberpunk city, emotional atmosphere, cinematic camera movement, Hollywood movie quality, deep emotional storytelling, dramatic soundtrack, masterpiece short film aesthetic.

prompt: A cinematic futuristic short film about a lonely young man addicted to technology in a hyper-connected AI world where nobody talks face to face anymore. People communicate only through holograms, smart glasses, and social media. One day, the internet suddenly shuts down globally. Phones die, AI assistants stop, and the city becomes silent. Slowly, people reconnect in real life — families talk, children play outside, strangers smile naturally. The protagonist meets a girl reading a physical book under a streetlight and experiences genuine human connection for the first time. Emotional ending where he voluntarily switches off his phone as sunrise lights the city. Ultra realistic visuals, neon cyberpunk city, emotional atmosphere, cinematic camera movement, Hollywood movie quality, deep emotional storytelling, dramatic soundtrack, masterpiece short film aesthetic.

scenes.visualPrompt:
EXT. CYBERPUNK CITY - NIGHT
NEO (20s, gaunt, haunted eyes) walks through a bustling, neon-drenched metropolis. Holographic advertisements shimmer on skyscrapers. Pedestrians are engrossed in smart glasses, their faces illuminated by unseen screens, never making eye contact. Neo's own smart glasses project a constant stream of data and social media feeds over his vision, a digital barrier between him and the real world.
CAMERA: High-angle tracking shot, pulling back slightly to reveal the overwhelming scale of the city and Neo's isolation within it. Volumetric lighting from neon signs casts long, deep blue and purple shadows. Anamorphic lens, wide aspect ratio, 2.39:1.
scenes.dialogueOrNarration: NARRATOR: We built a world of connection, a digital utopia. But the more we connected online, the more alone we became in real life. Our screens became our windows, and our walls.
scenes.audioPrompt: SFX: Muffled, distant city hum, synthesised advertisements, subtle chirps and notifications from unseen devices. Ambient: Deep, melancholic synth pads, slow and atmospheric.

scenes.visualPrompt:
INT. NEO'S APARTMENT - NIGHT
Neo sits hunched, bathed in the blue glow of multiple holographic screens displaying virtual friends and endless feeds. His apartment is minimalist, dominated by technology. Suddenly, the holograms flicker violently, pixelate, and then vanish. His smart glasses go dark. The city outside, once alive with digital light, plunges into a profound, unsettling darkness. A single emergency light flickers on in the hallway.
CAMERA: Close-up on Neo's face, wide-eyed with confusion and dawning fear as the digital world dies around him. Rapid cuts between glitching holograms and his stunned expression. Then, a slow zoom out to reveal the now-dark, silent room. Natural light from a distant city emergency light, stark contrast to previous neon, 16:9.
scenes.dialogueOrNarration: NARRATOR: Then, silence. An unprecedented quiet. The world, our world, simply… stopped. And for the first time, we heard our own thoughts.
scenes.audioPrompt: SFX: High-frequency digital glitches, crackling, then an abrupt, absolute silence. A distant, confused murmur rises from the street below. Ambient: Eerie, unsettling quiet, a low, sustained hum fading into nothingness.

scenes.visualPrompt:
EXT. STREET CORNER - DAWN
Neo walks through the eerily quiet, now dimly lit streets. People are slowly emerging, looking around, some interacting nervously. He spots a young woman, ELARA (20s), sitting under a flickering, old-fashioned streetlight, engrossed in a physical, paper book. She looks up, catches his eye, and offers a small, genuine smile. Neo, startled, manages a hesitant smile back. He glances at his dead smart glasses, then at Elara, then, with a deep breath, removes them, and tucks them into his pocket. The first rays of natural sunlight hit the city.
CAMERA: Medium shot, tracking Neo as he approaches Elara. Soft, diffused natural light mixes with the artificial glow of the streetlight. Over-the-shoulder shot of Neo, focusing on Elara's kind smile. Close-up on Neo's hand as he removes his smart glasses. Final wide shot as the sun rises, revealing the city in a new, hopeful light, cinematic bokeh, 2.39:1.
scenes.dialogueOrNarration:
ELARA: (Softly) Good morning. It's… quiet, isn't it? 
NEO: (A small, genuine smile) Yeah. It really is. Beautiful, even.
scenes.audioPrompt: SFX: Distant, natural city sounds – birds chirping, a gentle breeze, faint footsteps. Ambient: Hopeful, emotional orchestral music begins subtly, building with the sunrise, carrying a sense of renewal and warmth. Light, natural vocal delivery.

scenes.visualPrompt: A slow, gliding Steadicam shot in a minimalist apartment of soft whites and brushed silver. Kaelen, a man in his early 30s with soft, placid features, pale skin, and wide-set grey eyes, is lifted from a prone to a seated position by his bed. He wears a seamless, collarless tunic and matching trousers in a muted, matte grey synthetic fabric. As he stands, a seamless wall panel silently retracts. The shot follows him, holding a medium profile, as he observes his coffee being brewed by a chrome device. The lighting is diffused, shadowless sunlight from a smart glass window. Pristine digital clarity, no grain.
scenes.dialogueOrNarration: NARRATOR: There was a time when the world offered resistance. A texture. Now, it only offers a reflection.
scenes.audioPrompt: FOREGROUND: The faint rustle of self-smoothing fabric. MIDGROUND: A low, continuous, near-subsonic hum of the environment's life support. BACKGROUND: Sparse, ethereal synthesizer pads with a high, crystalline shimmer, creating a sense of serene emptiness. Voice is a low, measured male whisper.

scenes.visualPrompt: Static medium shot from inside a transparent transport pod. Kaelen, a man in his early 30s with soft, placid features, pale skin, and wide-set grey eyes in a muted grey tunic, sits perfectly still. Outside, canyons of chrome and glass towers glide past in a silent ballet. Suddenly, a small brown bird impacts the window camera-left with a soft thud, leaving a feathered smudge. Kaelen's placid eyes widen for a split second, his lips parting in a silent gasp. A cyan light instantly wipes the smudge clean. The camera executes a subtle, micro push-in on his face as his expression resets to neutral.
scenes.dialogueOrNarration: NARRATOR: Perfection is a fragile equation. It does not account for the weight of a feather, or the memory of a fall.
scenes.audioPrompt: FOREGROUND: A soft, fleshy thud against glass, followed by a faint electronic hiss. MIDGROUND: The almost-silent, high-frequency whine of the pod's inertial dampeners. BACKGROUND: The ethereal synthesizer pads are joined by a single, low, dissonant cello note that holds through the shot.

scenes.visualPrompt: Extreme close-up shot in a sterile digital archive. The fingers of Kaelen—a man in his early 30s with pale skin—hesitantly approach an artifact. The camera focuses on the cracked, imperfect glaze of a handmade ceramic mug. His fingertip, smooth and unblemished, makes contact and slowly traces a crack. A deliberate rack focus shifts from the texture of the mug to Kaelen's wide, grey eyes, which show a flicker of profound, unfamiliar longing. The lighting is cold, top-down gallery lighting, creating deep micro-shadows in the mug's cracks but leaving his face evenly lit.
scenes.dialogueOrNarration: NARRATOR: They called it longing. A flaw in the code of the heart. An echo of a world that hurt, and was beautiful for it.
scenes.audioPrompt: FOREGROUND: The faint, gritty, scraping sound of a fingertip on rough, glazed ceramic. MIDGROUND: Absolute, dead silence of a sound-proofed room. BACKGROUND: A single, melancholic piano note hangs in the air, sustained with heavy reverb.

scenes.visualPrompt: A slow, deliberate camera pull-out. The shot begins as a medium on Kaelen, a man in his early 30s with soft features and placid grey eyes, as he sinks into a sleek lounge chair in his minimalist apartment. A serene orb of cyan light, his holographic companion, drifts near him. As the camera pulls back, he becomes a small figure in the vast, perfect room, framed by the cool, gentle glow of the AI and the soft ambient pulse of the city lights outside the smart glass window. He closes his eyes in resignation. The final frame is a wide, symmetrical, lonely tableau.
scenes.dialogueOrNarration: NARRATOR: He was safe from the world. And from himself.
scenes.audioPrompt: FOREGROUND: A soft sigh from Kaelen. MIDGROUND: A low, pulsing, synthesized hum from the cyan orb, reminiscent of a slow heartbeat. BACKGROUND: The sparse synthesizer pads from Scene 1 return, now underscored by a deep, resonant cello drone that fades in slowly.

Bright colorful forest backgrounds with playful energy, cheerful family-friendly atmosphere, cute animal expressions, and nonstop friendly interactions between all characters. Every scene should feel lively, wholesome, funny, and full of friendship.

prompt:
Ultra-realistic cinematic short film, 4K HDR, natural lighting, Hollywood disaster-drama quality.

A beautiful sunny afternoon at a crowded tropical beach. Families, children, couples, and friends are enjoying their day. Kids are building sandcastles, parents laughing together, teenagers playing beach volleyball, friends taking selfies, people swimming, surfing, eating ice cream, drinking cold beverages, relaxing under umbrellas, and listening to music. The atmosphere is joyful, vibrant, and full of life. Genuine human happiness, laughter, excitement, friendship, love, and celebration are visible on every face.

Suddenly, something feels wrong.

The ocean begins behaving unnaturally. Waves stop moving normally. The water starts rapidly pulling back from the shoreline. Birds fly away frantically. The wind changes direction. Beachgoers slowly notice the strange phenomenon. Smiles fade. Confusion appears. People point toward the ocean. Conversations stop. Faces transition from happiness to uncertainty.

The water continues retreating farther than normal. Fear spreads through the crowd. Parents grab their children. Friends look at each other in shock. People begin recording with their phones while others instinctively step back. Anxiety, disbelief, concern, and tension become visible in realistic facial expressions.

Then a massive wall of water appears on the horizon.

Panic erupts instantly. Human emotions become intense and authentic. Fear, terror, shock, desperation, survival instinct, crying, screaming, confusion, urgency, and helplessness are visible. Parents carry children and run. Families hold hands tightly. Friends help each other escape. Some people fall and get back up. Lifeguards shout warnings. Crowds rush away from the beach. Sand flies through the air. Personal belongings are abandoned.

Handheld camera movement, realistic crowd behavior, emotional close-ups, cinematic slow-motion moments mixed with fast-paced action. Focus heavily on facial expressions and emotional transitions. Natural human reactions only. Ultra-realistic physics, realistic ocean behavior, dramatic atmosphere, immersive sound design, emotional storytelling, documentary-style realism, award-winning cinematography, highly detailed faces, photorealistic humans, cinematic depth of field, epic disaster movie quality.

Mood progression: Joy → Wonder → Confusion → Fear → Panic → Survival.

No text, no subtitles, no logos, no watermarks.

prompt:
Ultra-realistic cinematic short film, 4K HDR, natural lighting, Hollywood disaster-drama quality.

A beautiful sunny afternoon at a crowded tropical beach. Families, children, couples, and friends are enjoying their day. Kids are building sandcastles, parents laughing together, teenagers playing beach volleyball, friends taking selfies, people swimming, surfing, eating ice cream, drinking cold beverages, relaxing under umbrellas, and listening to music. The atmosphere is joyful, vibrant, and full of life. Genuine human happiness, laughter, excitement, friendship, love, and celebration are visible on every face.

Suddenly, something feels wrong.

The ocean begins behaving unnaturally. Waves stop moving normally. The water starts rapidly pulling back from the shoreline. Birds fly away frantically. The wind changes direction. Beachgoers slowly notice the strange phenomenon. Smiles fade. Confusion appears. People point toward the ocean. Conversations stop. Faces transition from happiness to uncertainty.

The water continues retreating farther than normal. Fear spreads through the crowd. Parents grab their children. Friends look at each other in shock. People begin recording with their phones while others instinctively step back. Anxiety, disbelief, concern, and tension become visible in realistic facial expressions.

Then a massive wall of water appears on the horizon.

Panic erupts instantly. Human emotions become intense and authentic. Fear, terror, shock, desperation, survival instinct, crying, screaming, confusion, urgency, and helplessness are visible. Parents carry children and run. Families hold hands tightly. Friends help each other escape. Some people fall and get back up. Lifeguards shout warnings. Crowds rush away from the beach. Sand flies through the air. Personal belongings are abandoned.

Handheld camera movement, realistic crowd behavior, emotional close-ups, cinematic slow-motion moments mixed with fast-paced action. Focus heavily on facial expressions and emotional transitions. Natural human reactions only. Ultra-realistic physics, realistic ocean behavior, dramatic atmosphere, immersive sound design, emotional storytelling, documentary-style realism, award-winning cinematography, highly detailed faces, photorealistic humans, cinematic depth of field, epic disaster movie quality.

Mood progression: Joy → Wonder → Confusion → Fear → Panic → Survival.

scenes.dialogueOrNarration: NARRATOR: And then... the rhythm broke. The world held its breath and waited.

scenes.dialogueOrNarration: NARRATOR: In her eyes, the perfect day cracked like a photograph dropped on stone.
